name: deepdive
description: This repository contains the research and show notes for the "DeepDive with Gemini" podcast. The podcast explores a wide range of topics, from ancient philosophy and modern finance to cutting-edge technology and creative storytelling.

scripts.build:pwa: mdbook build && cp pwa/manifest.json pwa/sw-register.js book/ && cp -r pwa/icons book/ && workbox injectManifest workbox-config.js
